title: Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and the Search for Effective Tumor Therapies Using High-Throughput Drug Screening.
abstract: Neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) is a complex, multisystem, genetic disorder caused by germline
authors: Stephanie J Bouley; Benjamin E Housden; James A Walker
